description: Carlo Lasmarias, COO and co-founder of Hummingbot, discusses the impact of blockchain speed on high-frequency trading. He highlights the advantages of using Solana for decentralized exchanges and the upcoming Liquidity Mining platform that enables community participation in market making.
topic_summary: In this video, Carlo Lasmarias explains how blockchain technology can modernize financial processes, emphasizing the importance of speed in high-frequency trading. He discusses the limitations of decentralized exchanges compared to centralized ones and introduces Liquidity Mining as a new opportunity for the Solana community [t=90:26].
